NAVAREA XIX 74/13
<SPAN style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt; mso-ansi-language: EN" lang="EN">NORWEGIAN SEA
HALTENBANKEN
1.M/V RAMFORM TITAN IS CONDUCTING SEISIC SURVEY OPERATIONS AND TOWING 14 STREAMERS AT  4.5 MILE LENGTH
  IN AREA BOUNDED BY:  
  A. 64-59N 005-58E
  B. 65-26N 006-28E
  C. 65-20N 006-58E
  D. 65-13N 006-51E
  E. 65-07N 007-25E
  F. 64-56N 007-16E
  G. 64-43N 007-15E
  H. 64-59N 005-58E
ALL TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO GIVE WIDE BERTH, 6 MILE ASTERN, 3 MILE ON THE SIDES AND AHEAD.<?xml:namespace prefix =" u5" /><u5:p></u5:p>
<SPAN style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt; mso-ansi-language: EN" lang="EN">2.<SPAN style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt; mso-ansi-language: EN-US" lang="EN-US">CANCEL NAVAREA <SPAN style="FONT-SIZE: 10pt; mso-ansi-language: EN" lang="EN">XIX 56/13   <u5:p></u5:p><?xml:namespace prefix =" o" ns =" "urn:schemas-microsoft-com:office:office"" /><o:p></o:p>
<u5:p></u5:p>
